title: The Cascade of Green IT Challenges
description: A flowchart depicting how core technical challenges in Green IT create cascading effects, leading to broader economic, regulatory, and strategic obstacles for organizations.
relationships: High Energy Consumption leads to a Large Carbon Footprint and High Operational Costs
Short Hardware Lifecycles and high consumption drive E-Waste Generation
E-Waste and Emissions create Regulatory Compliance Pressure
All core challenges contribute to a Lack of Standardized Metrics for measurement
The combination of these challenges forms a complex web of barriers to achieving IT Sustainability
